calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Daniel Riley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff PEI Asset Pool V, LLC.
Kelly Christi, Property Manager for plaintiff PIE Asset Pool V, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Telka Walker or John Davis.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 28, 2018.
Defendants Telka Walker and John Davis' answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 6, 20187.
DOE defendants were dimissed on March 21, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on March 22, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff PEI Asset Pool V, LLC, and against defendants Telka Walker and John Davis, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $4,750.00.
Holdover Damages - $5,253.66.
Attorney Fees - $790.00.
Costs - $380.00.

Total - $11,173.66.

Additionally, plaintiff PEI Asset Pool V, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1888 Geneva Avenue, #1115, San Francisco, CA 94134.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To Apr-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501
